result.reason: The 'SmartSize' feature, when enabled for RDP/VNC connections, prevents manual resizing of the view area; the issue likely stems from users being unable to toggle this setting or an unclear UI for adjustment when SmartSize is off.
result.approach: Investigate the 'SmartSize' toggle functionality within ConnectionWindow.cs and its underlying implementation in RdpProtocol.cs and Connection.Protocol.VNC.cs to ensure disabling SmartSize correctly allows manual view area adjustment and that the UI clearly indicates SmartSize status and allows for intuitive toggling.
